info.name: 📌 Eden AI API
info.description:
### About

"The full stack AI platform for developers."

Supports parallel requests to multiple providers. Model providers include OpenAI, Amazon, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, and xAI.

### Prerequisites

- Postman Account
    
- Eden AI Account: [https://app.edenai.run/](https://app.edenai.run/)
    

### Usage

1. Create a fork
    
2. Update collection variables
    
3. Send requests
    

### Documentation

- API: [https://docs.edenai.co/docs/quickstart-ai-apis](https://docs.edenai.co/docs/quickstart-ai-apis)
    
- Models: [https://app.edenai.run/bricks/catalog](https://app.edenai.run/bricks/catalog)

body.raw:
{
    "providers": [
        "amazon/amazon.nova-pro-v1:0",
        "anthropic/claude-3-opus-latest",
        "google/gemini-1.5-pro",
        "xai/grok-2",
        "mistral/pixtral-large-latest",
        "openai/o1"
    ],
    "text": "If I dry one shirt in the sun, it takes 1 hour. How long do 3 shirts take?"
}

response.name: OK
